Client tracker preview for Airy Pines Boarding Kennel

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Airy Pines Boarding Kennel: One place for every reservation at Airy Pines - DHLP, rabies, and bordetella expirations, feeding and medication notes, and drop-off/pickup windows in one view instead of phone-and-fax tag.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Bring Your Best Friend to Camp, All dogs must have current DHLP, Rabies and Bordetella (Kennel Cough) inoculations, Please call for your Doggie Day Care reservation, A copy of inoculation certificates is required at check-in or they can be faxed prior to your dog's stay

Today ops snapshot Reservation board Pet record (Biscuit Y.) Reservation + Vaccine View Stay Timing + Holiday Window Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View Setup Map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Reservation board replaces the Jotform plus call-and-fax loop - every inquiry becomes a tracked card
  • DHLP, rabies, and bordetella expirations tracked per pet - with the one-year bordetella booster rule surfaced before check-in
  • Drop-off and pickup windows (7:30-11:30am / 3:30-5:30pm weekday) live on each reservation instead of in a paper calendar

1. Today ops snapshot

Today ops snapshot

Today's check-ins, check-outs, daycare headcount, and vaccine-expiry alerts in one glance - so the front desk isn't juggling the Jotform inbox and the fax pile between pickups.

Open this view

2. Reservation board

Reservation board

Every reservation as a card: Inquiry / Jotform submitted -> Free daycare trial day -> Confirmed (vaccines faxed) -> Boarding -> Check-out + recap. Replaces the Jotform-plus-fax-plus-call loop.

Open this view

3. Pet record (Biscuit Y.)

Pet record (Biscuit Y.)

One page per pet: owner + emergency contact, vet, DHLP / rabies / bordetella expirations with the one-year booster rule, weight-tier rate, feeding, meds, special-care notes, repeat-guest history.

Open this view

4. Reservation + Vaccine View

Reservation + Vaccine View

Stay dates, DHLP / rabies / bordetella expirations with the one-week-waiting-period rule for stale boosters, feeding and meds, and weight-tier rate on a single confirm-the-stay page.

Open this view

5. Stay Timing + Holiday Window

Stay Timing + Holiday Window

A month strip of overlapping stays, Saturday trial-day slots, and holiday surge weeks (Memorial Day, July 4, Labor Day) so the waitlist is visible instead of living in the Jotform inbox.

Open this view

6. Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

A short check-out recap per pet plus a next-stay nudge - turns every pickup into the start of the next booking without the front desk making a second phone call.

Open this view

7. Setup Map

Setup Map

How the workspace is wired: Jotform inquiry -> board -> pet record -> vaccines + bordetella-age rule -> recap -> repeat booking. One page, one map, no Mod_Security fax-pile guesswork.

Open this view
